mapper.select: SELECT * FROM overtime_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND converted_to_comp = 0 ORDER BY overtime_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO overtime_record ( employee_id, overtime_date, start_time, end_time, hours, converted_to_comp, create_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{overtimeDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{hours}, #{convertedToComp}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE overtime_record SET converted_to_comp = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
